name: SIFCO INDUSTRIES INC
summary: SIFCO Industries, Inc. is an Ohio-based manufacturer of forgings, machined components, and sub-assemblies primarily for Aerospace & Energy markets. Operating from Cleveland, OH and Orange, CA, SIFCO produces OEM and aftermarket components for aircraft gas turbine engines, steam turbine blades, landing gear, helicopter rotors, and structural airframe parts using steel, titanium, nickel alloys, and aluminum. In October 2024, the Company sold its Italian subsidiary CBlade to streamline operations and refocus on core aerospace forging.
